_comment: ArkAP plugin runtime config. Copy to ArkAP.config.json next to ArkAP.dll (the installer never overwrites an existing ArkAP.config.json).
_mode_help: ap = follow the Archipelago server (real multiworld). offline = self-randomize a local seed.json for solo hook testing.
_multiplayer_help: false = one shared AP slot for the whole server (solo - the default). true = PER-PLAYER slots: each survivor's engrams/tames/checks are their own AP slot. Each player needs their own yaml + their own connector instance pointed at ipc\<CharacterName> (exact survivor name). See docs/GETTING_STARTED.md - Multiplayer.
